label: Real-Estate Segment — deal sourcing + evaluation agent cluster
summary: A build-and-operate agent cluster that sources properties from public county records, enriches them via a licensed property API, and scores every one for flip / rental / wholesale with a blended deal score. Deterministic evaluation — runs with no API quota.

agents.name: realty-scout
agents.role: Coordinator — runs the funnel, ranks deals, writes the Scout brief.

agents.name: re-county-data-fetcher
agents.role: Auto-sources Florida counties from the FDOR statewide cadastral API (all 67 counties, official public records — no scraping).

agents.name: re-intake-agent
agents.role: Ingests county property-record CSV exports into the property store.

agents.name: re-county-feed-agent
agents.role: Works the county watch list — sources properties per county (API + CSV), files records to-dos, keeps targets monitored.

agents.name: re-enrichment-agent
agents.role: Adds AVM value + rent estimate via a licensed property API.

agents.name: re-evaluation-agent
agents.role: Scores every property flip/rental/wholesale + blended deal score.

agents.name: re-distress-monitor
agents.role: Re-scans the property set for motivated-seller signals; surfaces ranked hot leads.

agents.name: re-comp-analyst
agents.role: Comparable-sales analysis — comp-based ARV per property.

agents.name: re-deal-alerter
agents.role: Telegram push the moment a new A-tier deal scores.

agents.name: re-market-expander
agents.role: Grows the county watch list on its own — adds the next priority county on a cadence so coverage always expands without manual county adding.

agents.name: re-freshness-monitor
agents.role: Snapshots property-count growth, enrichment coverage, and deal tiers each run; powers the dashboard freshness panel.

agents.name: re-outreach-drafter
agents.role: Drafts TCPA + fair-housing-aware first-contact LETTERS per property — DRAFT only, attorney review required before sending.

agents.name: re-mao-offer-drafter
agents.role: Drafts purchase offers per property using the 70% rule (MAO = ARV*0.70 - repairs) + EMD / DD / financing terms from buyerprofile.json. DRAFT only.

agents.name: re-skip-trace
agents.role: Skip-trace stub — exits 0 until a provider (BatchSkipTracing, REI Skip, etc.) is wired and SKIP_TRACE_API_KEY is set.

data_layer: businesses/day14-realty/ops/ (properties.json, evaluations.json, targets.json) + businesses/day14-realty/intake/ (drop county CSVs here)
telegram: Send the bot a county or metro to add a watch target — e.g. "realty Lee County, FL" or "realty Tampa Bay area". "realty targets" lists the watch list.

data_sources.county: Official county property-appraiser data exports — public records.
data_sources.valuation: Licensed property API (RentCast / ATTOM / Estated). Env: REALESTATE_API_KEY.
data_sources.prohibited: Zillow / Redfin scraping — against their terms and brittle.

reuse: Second entry in the Day14 vertical-pack library, after lawn-care. The recursive-expansion engine can clone this pattern for any data-sourcing + evaluation segment.
